evals.name: brownfield-cache-staleness
evals.prompt: the reference map goes stale when entities are renamed
evals.expected_output: Round 1 should present a gap map (codebase observations + explicit gaps in human context and foundations dimensions) and ask a clarifying question targeting the weakest understanding dimension. It should NOT present a problem statement or complete analysis.

evals.name: greenfield-preview-feature
evals.prompt: we need a way for designers to preview their DSL changes before committing them
evals.expected_output: Round 1 should present observations about the current DSL system and explicit gaps about who needs previews, what they've tried, why now, and what's in/out of scope. Should NOT jump to proposing a preview architecture.

evals.name: brownfield-performance
evals.prompt: the entity list page is slow when there are more than 500 entities
evals.expected_output: Round 1 should note what it can see about the entity list implementation and explicitly flag gaps: who experiences this, how often, what's been tried, whether this is getting worse. Should NOT diagnose the performance issue or propose solutions.
